pinpoint.campaign.limits.Daily.Description: The maximum number of messages that a campaign can send to a single endpoint during a 24-hour period. The maximum value is 100.

pinpoint.campaign.limits.MaximumDuration.Description: The maximum amount of time, in seconds, that a campaign can attempt to deliver a message after the scheduled start time for the campaign. The minimum value is 60 seconds.

pinpoint.campaign.limits.MessagesPerSeco.Description: The maximum number of messages that a campaign can send each second. The minimum value is 50. The maximum value is 20,000.

pinpoint.campaign.limits.Session.Description: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

pinpoint.campaign.limits.Total.Description: The maximum number of messages that a campaign can send to a single endpoint during the course of the campaign. The maximum value is 100.
